mapper.select: select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, DATA_TYPE as dataType, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 7 DAY) and PUSH_HOUR < #{nowHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by DATA_TYPE, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d')

select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, case when DATA_TYPE = '1' then '接入' when DATA_TYPE = '2' then '处理' when DATA_TYPE = '3' then '入库' when DATA_TYPE = '4' then '集成' else DATA_TYPE end as dataType, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 7 DAY) and (DATA_TYPE = '1' or DATA_TYPE = '2')
and upper(out_protocol) = upper(#{tableId})
group by DATA_TYPE, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d'), PUSH_HOUR

select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, CONCAT(STORE_TYPE, '>', PROJECT_NAME) as storageLocation, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 7 DAY) and DATA_TYPE = '3' and PROJECT_NAME is not null
and upper(out_protocol) = upper(#{tableId})
group by DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d'), PUSH_HOUR, CONCAT(STORE_TYPE, '>', PROJECT_NAME)

select out_en_name as outTableNameEn, out_cn_name as outTableNameCh, out_protocol as outProtocol, sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, DATA_TYPE as dataType, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 7 DAY) and PUSH_HOUR < #{nowHour, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and out_en_name is not null group by out_en_name, out_cn_name, out_protocol, DATA_TYPE, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d')
